title: Layered Portrait Collage AI

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Vertical 9:16 layered portrait collage built around adult female fashion model with expressive eyes and natural skin realism, white silk shirt and minimal gold earring, and top eyes crop, middle lips and cheek crop, bottom collarbone and hand gesture. Subject: giant dessert mascot standee supplies the swappable theme detail for this template. adult female fashion model with expressive eyes and natural skin realism appears as the same adult beauty subject across three different close-up portrait photographs rebuilt into one vertical emotional collage. Scene: The background stays quiet, editorial, and abstract enough to keep attention on skin realism, gaze, lips, shoulders, collarbone, hair, hands, and fashion texture. Composition: top eyes crop, middle lips and cheek crop, bottom collarbone and hand gesture; fixed three-section collage structure: top close crop of eyes or half face, middle crop of lips, cheek, jawline, or side face, bottom crop of shoulders, collarbone, hair, hand, or outfit detail. It must not look like one portrait sliced into strips. Signature Elements: The template identity is the layered three-photo portrait collage: expressive eyes on top, soft lips or cheek pause in the middle, and non-full-face shoulder or collarbone detail at the bottom. Style: Editorial fashion photography, beauty campaign, magazine spread, emotional portrait collage, strong skin realism, cinematic quietness, and premium vertical poster finish. Color Palette: Fixed soft amber, cream light, velvet burgundy, silver grey, and restrained beauty-campaign neutrals; keep color relationships elegant and low clutter. Lighting: Soft beauty lighting with warm sunset side light or soft window quality, controlled highlights on skin and fabric, quiet shadows, and emotional depth. Camera: Three different close-up portrait crops of the same adult subject, rebuilt as one vertical 9:16 collage with consistent identity and different framing rhythms. Materials: white silk shirt and minimal gold earring provides the visible fashion texture while skin, hair, fabric, jewelry, and hand detail remain realistic and tactile. Typography: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure. Restrictions: Clean focused visual treatment with coherent detail and source-consistent structure.
